case_title: GALINA ITINA VS. U.S.A. AUTO BODY & PAINTING , INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT U.S.A. AUTO BODY & PAINTING , INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ITINA, GALINA AS TO DEFENDANT U.S.A. AUTO BODY & PAINTING , INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITINA, GALINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U.S.A. AUTO BODY & PAINTING , INC. $720.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
